## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Test-only change

## Affected packages

<!-- List the @nextvm/* packages this PR touches. -->

- `@nextvm/...`

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have run `pnpm validate` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have run `pnpm test` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the relevant docs page under `docs/`
- [ ] I have added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing change
- [ ] I have not introduced any GUARD violations (run `pnpm validate`)
